Actually earlier they listed [S11] symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::FixtureManifest. Yes S11 is that. So we need to call session.expand_dependents@v1 with payload containing target_selector maybe "S11"? Or use its logical key? Readiness_state: after tool_call, we are not ready yet? Actually after calling expand_dependents, we likely will get a result soon. So readiness_state maybe "evidence_visible" or "ready_to_edit"? The contract says readiness_state can be "not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit". Since we are about to call a tool to get evidence, we are not ready yet. So "not_ready". But maybe after calling tool, we will get result and then become evidence_visible? The instruction: When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must match one of the registered tool names. Then JSON includes acquired_fact_ids (maybe empty) and readiness_state. Probably set readiness_state to "not_ready". Let's do that.

Assistant_message: brief status, maybe "Calling session.expand_dependents to gather dependents of FixtureManifest". Must be brief.

Now produce JSON only, no markdown.
